Block.Para: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (exclusion of income received by an athlete from a non-profit club, society or association)

This bill was introduced during the First Session of the 39th Parliament. Pursuant to the Standing Orders of the House of Commons, it is deemed to have been considered and approved at all stages completed at the time of prorogation of the First Session. The number of the bill remains unchanged.

Also available on the Parliament of Canada Web Site at the following address:
http://www.parl.gc.ca
This enactment excludes income not exceeding $8,000, received from a non-profit club, society or association, from the income of an athlete for taxation years starting in 2000.
An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (exclusion of income received by an athlete from a non-profit club, society or association)
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

1. Subsection 81(1) of the Income Tax Act is amended by striking out the word âorâ at the end of paragraph (q), by adding the word âorâ at the end of paragraph (r) and by adding the following after paragraph (r):

Para.change: income for the year, not exceeding $8,000, received by an athlete from a non-profit club, society or association that is operated exclusively for the purpose of improving athletic performances and promoting amateur athletics.

Block.Para: 2. This Act is deemed to have come into force on January 1, 2000.

Published under authority of the Speaker of the House of Commons
